channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Strict regulations on nurses with advanced degrees and training prompt some to move
item.description: APRNs — advanced practice registered nurses — help provide access to health care especially in areas where there may be a shortage. Strict regulations in some states prompt many to cross state lines.
item.content:encoded: APRNs — advanced practice registered nurses — help provide access to health care especially in areas where there may be a shortage. Strict regulations in some states prompt many to cross state lines.
item.dc:creator: Najifa Farhat

item.title: Trial starts for man accused of starting what became the Palisades Fire
item.description: Attorneys gave opening statements in the trial of the man accused of sparking the Palisades Fire. The January 2025 fire was among the most destructive in California history.
item.content:encoded: Attorneys gave opening statements in the trial of the man accused of sparking the Palisades Fire. The January 2025 fire was among the most destructive in California history.
item.dc:creator: Steve Futterman

item.title: Ebola testing has improved in DRC, but still isn't enough
item.description: The Democratic Republic of Congo has improved its capacity for PCR testing. But it may not be enough to keep up with a rapidly expanding outbreak, and there are no approved rapid tests yet.
item.content:encoded: The Democratic Republic of Congo has improved its capacity for PCR testing. But it may not be enough to keep up with a rapidly expanding outbreak, and there are no approved rapid tests yet.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Lambert

item.title: Boston is credited with having the U.S.'s first football club. But which football?
item.description: Boston is widely credited with having the first organized football club un the U.S. But exactly which form of football has been a matter of some debate.
item.content:encoded: Boston is widely credited with having the first organized football club un the U.S. But exactly which form of football has been a matter of some debate.
item.dc:creator: Sam Turken

item.title: Former U.S. coach Gregg Berhalter previews the 2026 World Cup
item.description: On the eve of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, NPR's Mary Louise Kelly speaks with Gregg Berhalter, who coached the US team at the last men's World Cup in Qatar.
item.content:encoded: On the eve of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, NPR's Mary Louise Kelly speaks with Gregg Berhalter, who coached the US team at the last men's World Cup in Qatar.
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Pierre

item.title: Union organizing, midterms take center stage at AFL-CIO convention in Minneapolis
item.description: With the AFL-CIO convention in the rearview and the UAW convention ahead, the future of union participation in politics is far from settled, especially as membership gets more politically diverse.
item.content:encoded: With the AFL-CIO convention in the rearview and the UAW convention ahead, the future of union participation in politics is far from settled, especially as membership gets more politically diverse.
item.dc:creator: Don Gonyea

item.title: Israel orders evacuation of Tyre's last safe neighborhood as strikes intensify
item.description: In Lebanon, Israeli airstrikes are emptying parts of an ancient city, but for residents too old or too sick to flee, staying behind is the only option.
item.content:encoded: In Lebanon, Israeli airstrikes are emptying parts of an ancient city, but for residents too old or too sick to flee, staying behind is the only option.
item.dc:creator: Jane Arraf

item.title: Bill Gates tells House probe that he was not aware of Epstein's crimes
item.description: Bill Gates was on Capitol Hill to answer questions about his relationship with Jeffrey Epstein. Gates told lawmakers he was not aware of Epstein's crimes.
item.content:encoded: Bill Gates was on Capitol Hill to answer questions about his relationship with Jeffrey Epstein. Gates told lawmakers he was not aware of Epstein's crimes.
item.dc:creator: Ava Berger

item.title: At Malawi's Dzaleka Refugee Camp, yoga is a tool for healing
item.description: At the Dzaleka Refugee Camp in Malawi, yoga has become a popular activity for the people living there. We meet the two people who brought the practice to the camp.
item.content:encoded: At the Dzaleka Refugee Camp in Malawi, yoga has become a popular activity for the people living there. We meet the two people who brought the practice to the camp.
item.dc:creator: Lennon Sherburne

item.title: In the Ukraine war, new ground-based drones are playing a key role on the battlefield
item.description: Ukraine relies on robotic warfare to punch above its weight on the battlefield, including shifting frontline duties from soldiers to land drones.
item.content:encoded: Ukraine relies on robotic warfare to punch above its weight on the battlefield, including shifting frontline duties from soldiers to land drones.
item.dc:creator: Joanna Kakissis
